subcodes.title: Words to Mulla Husayn
subcodes.first_line: O thou who art the first to believe in Me! Verily I say, I am the Báb, the Gate of God, and thou art the Babu'l-ab
subcodes.subjects: @Letters of the Living, @Declaration; advent of the Bab, @wisdom [hikmat], @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world
